attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPPINGS)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.BUNDLE_MAPPING_ID, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.COMP_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.COMP_SEQ, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.ITEM_NAME, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.PARENT_BUNDLE_MAPPING_ID, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.RELATION_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.DISCOUNT_PERCENT, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.REQUIRED_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.MIN_QTY, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.MAX_QTY, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.MULTI_FLAVOR, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.BATCH_ID, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.CATEGORY_NAME, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.CATEGORY_ID, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.DESCRIPTION, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.EGE_REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.PUBLISH_FLAG, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.BUNDLE_ID, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP,
 (
 select BATCH_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP
 minus
 select BATCH_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.BATCH_ID = STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.BATCH_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXITM_EGE_BUNDLE_MAPP.REFRESH_DATETIME
